contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix mislabeled 'View cohort' CTA on programs page
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/110
  
  Details:
  Caught and fixed a UX cul-de-sac on the public programs surface.
  
  The card CTA on truesight.me/programs.html read "View cohort →" but the card actually linked to the program landing page (programs/<slug>/index.html). The program page in turn had its own "View cohort →" button that finally went to members.html. Two identical CTAs back-to-back, where the first one lied about its destination — felt like a redirect loop on click.
  
  Fix: relabeled the card CTA to "View program →" so it matches the destination. The program page keeps "View cohort →" since clicking that one actually shows the cohort.
  
  Verified live at https://truesight.me/programs.html after gh repo sync from beta.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/110
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
